_source: Copy this file to profile.json and fill in your details, OR run: bun run sync
name: Jane Doe
summary: Product-minded full-stack engineer with experience in SaaS, applied ML, and developer tooling. Enjoys solving real user problems and building reliable systems at scale.

workExperience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Built a real-time dashboard for monitoring API health, reducing on-call response time by 30%.
Refactored the authentication service to support SSO, enabling enterprise customer onboarding.
Wrote 150+ integration tests, increasing code coverage from 42% to 78%.

workExperience.title: Frontend Developer (Contract)
bullets: Designed and implemented the user onboarding flow, improving activation rate by 22%.
Collaborated with design to ship a component library used across 4 product surfaces.

projects.name: OpenRoute
bullets: Built an open-source routing engine for multi-modal transit directions, serving 500+ daily users.
Integrated with 3 transit agency APIs; implemented a caching layer that reduced p99 latency by 60%.

projects.name: NoteSync
bullets: Developed a local-first note-taking app with real-time sync across devices using CRDTs.
Published to GitHub with 200+ stars in the first month.

leadership.description: Organized technical workshops, coding competitions, and industry speaker events.
